quotes.text: Stop overthinking. Start shipping. The market will tell you what to build next.
quotes.author: Pieter Levels

quotes.text: The hardest part of SaaS isn't building the product. It's maintaining it while building the next version of it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first product taught you everything. Your second product teaches you what actually matters.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best prototypes are ugly ones. If it's pretty, you'll fall in love with it. If it's ugly, you'll iterate.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first product won't be your best. Your second won't either. Your tenth might be the one.
quotes.author: based
